reason: This is a straightforward configuration edit to forward root email, involving only the addition of an alias in /etc/aliases and running newaliases. It poses minimal risk of system breakage, lockout, or service disruption, aligning with safe STIG remediation patterns for file-based configurations.
estimated_impact: Misconfiguration could lead to undelivered email notifications for critical system alerts; If the alias points to an untrusted or compromised email address, it may expose sensitive information
